dimensions.algorithms: Evaluates candidate choice of data structures, computational complexity awareness, and efficiency trade-offs.
dimensions.system_design: Evaluates component decoupling, scaling approaches, API interface boundary definition, and bottleneck identification.
dimensions.debugging: Evaluates code navigation, root-cause isolation speed, and edge case correction patterns.
dimensions.code_quality_reasoning: Evaluates clean code philosophy, readability choices, naming conventions, and structural maintainability reasoning.
dimensions.langgraph_familiarity: Evaluates understanding of stateful multi-agent DAGs, loop boundaries, and memory persistence channels.
dimensions.rag_delivery_experience: Evaluates chunking strategies, vector embeddings storage management, and contextual retrieval matching pipelines.
dimensions.hallucination_handling: Evaluates guardrail implementation patterns, evaluation criteria validation, and safety system prompts.
dimensions.quantization: Evaluates model compression understanding, FP16/INT8 weight optimization, and memory footprint management.
dimensions.ml_fundamentals: Evaluates cross-validation, loss function optimization mechanics, and neural token attention math foundations.
